fields.summary: Provides static methods for encoding image data to the WebP format.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder" /> provides static methods for encoding pixels to the WebP image format, both as still images and as animated WebP files. Use <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.Encode(SkiaSharp.SKPixmap,SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions)" /> for a single frame or <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(System.ReadOnlySpan{SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame},SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions)" /> for animated output.

## Examples

```csharp
using var bitmap = new SKBitmap(200, 200);
// ... draw into bitmap ...
var options = SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default;
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.Encode(bitmap.PeekPixels(), options);
if (data != null)
    File.WriteAllBytes("output.webp", data.ToArray());
```
]]></format>

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap as a WebP image and returns the result as <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded WebP image, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap as a WebP image and writes the result to an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWStream" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The stream that receives the encoded WebP data.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (System.IO.Stream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap as a WebP image and writes the result to a <see cref="T:System.IO.Stream" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The stream that receives the encoded WebP data.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? EncodeAnimated (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.summary: Encodes a sequence of frames as an animated WebP image and returns the result as <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" />.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> containing the encoded animated WebP, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding failed.

params.frames: The frames to include in the animation.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding succeeded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The stream that receives the encoded animated WebP data.
params.frames: The frames to include in the animation.
